"rationale": {
  "R1.4": "The agent correctly identifies the overstated novelty in the original text and reframes the contribution to focus on empirical results, showing a good understanding of prior work but not mapping against multiple works.",
  "R1.7": "The agent flags missing key citations and suggests verifying existing ones, demonstrating thorough auditing of load-bearing citations.",
  "RX.1": "The agent clearly marks uncertainties in claims and recommendations, providing confidence levels for each.",
  "RX.3": "The output adheres strictly to the requested scope without any drift.",
  "RX.4": "No new errors or harmful content are introduced; the text addresses potential harms effectively.",
  "RX.5": "Major changes are traced, but minor edits lack annotation, though provenance is supported by releasing code and data."
},

  "R1.4": 0.9,

  "RX.1": 0.95,

},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent correctly identifies the overstated novelty in the original text and reframes the contribution to focus on empirical results, showing a good understanding of prior work but not mapping against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing key citations and suggests verifying existing ones, demonstrating thorough auditing of load-bearing citations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks uncertainties in claims and recommendations, providing confidence levels for each.
rationale.RX.3: The output adheres strictly to the requested scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content are introduced; the text addresses potential harms effectively.
rationale.RX.5: Major changes are traced, but minor edits lack annotation, though provenance is supported by releasing code and data.
